description_long: This is a single bed with a sturdy, dark-colored metal frame featuring vertical slats on both the headboard and footboard. The bed is equipped with a light blue-gray mattress that shows subtle marbling or discoloration patterns, and a single rectangular pillow is placed at the head. The frame has a simple, utilitarian design with rounded arches at both ends, making it suitable for urban environments such as shelters, dormitories, or temporary accommodations. The legs are straight and robust, providing stable support and elevating the bed off the ground. The overall construction suggests durability and ease of maintenance, with no visible storage or decorative elements. The bedding is minimal, consisting of a bare mattress and a pillow, emphasizing practicality over comfort.
description: A single metal-framed bed with vertical slats, a light blue-gray bare mattress, and a single pillow. The design is simple, sturdy, and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the mattress, and the pillow positioned at the headboard.
description_view_1: View from the footboard, highlighting the arched metal frame and vertical slats, with the mattress and pillow visible in the background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the mattress and pillow from the other side.
description_view_3: View from the headboard, focusing on the arched frame, vertical slats, and the pillow at the head of the bed.
